title: Rethinking the Reliability of Multi-agent System: A Perspective from Byzantine Fault Tolerance
problem_statement: The reliability of multi-agent systems (MAS) using large language model (LLM)-based agents remains largely unexplored, particularly whether substituting traditional agents with LLM-based agents can effectively enhance MAS reliability. title: MCP-SafetyBench: A Benchmark for Safety Evaluation of Large Language Models with Real-World MCP Servers
